_comment: Genesis config for the `local` Hardhat network. Loaded by scripts/deploy-univerify.ts. Addresses below are the Ethereum addresses derived from the well-known Substrate dev private keys for Alice / Bob / Charlie (see web/src/config/evm.ts). metadataHash=0x00..00 means `no off-chain metadata attached`; real deployments should use the keccak256 of the institution's DID document, IPFS CID, etc.
